cot_prefix: Okay, so Alice and Bob are playing this game with tokens. The rules are they take turns removing either 1 or 4 tokens from the stack. Alice goes first, and whoever takes the last token wins. We need to figure out how many numbers n (from 1 to 2024) are such that Bob can guarantee a win no matter what Alice does.
